title: AI Linocut Print
description: Renders a photo as a hand-carved high-contrast linocut print.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a hand-carved linocut print. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, and important scene objects. Render the image with bold black carved shapes, expressive white gouge marks, rough irregular edges, visible ink pressure, cross-cut texture, strong negative space, and handmade fibrous paper. Prioritize a readable silhouette and recognizable facial structure. Use black ink on warm ivory paper with at most one restrained accent color. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted face, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, smooth vector art, fine photorealistic shading, gradients, glossy 3D render, watercolor washes, full-color photograph, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. rust-red accent ink, rougher carving marks...
